name: maintenance-log
description: Tracks maintenance intervals for all vessel systems including engines, hydraulics, winches, refrigeration, and safety equipment. Generates maintenance alerts and service reports.
author: Cocapn

equipmentId.description: Unique identifier for the equipment (e.g., ENG-001, HYD-001)

intervalType.description: How the maintenance interval is measured

intervalValue.description: Numeric value of the interval (hours or days)

lastCompleted.description: Date the task was last completed (YYYY-MM-DD)

nextDueDate.description: Date the task is next due (YYYY-MM-DD)

estimatedCost.description: Estimated cost of the maintenance task in USD

criticality.description: Equipment criticality level. Critical equipment failure stops operations.

overdue.description: Task is past due date. Critical equipment overdue generates immediate alert.
overdue.action: Schedule immediately. Critical equipment should not operate with overdue maintenance.

dueWithin7Days.description: Task due within 7 days. Plan to complete before next trip or at next port call.
dueWithin7Days.action: Add to port call work list. Verify parts availability.

dueWithin30Days.description: Task due within 30 days. Include in upcoming maintenance planning.
dueWithin30Days.action: Order parts if needed. Schedule into upcoming port call.

schedule.dailyCheck: Check for overdue items and items due within 7 days
schedule.monthlyReport: Full maintenance schedule review and budget tracking
